home.meta.title: Image to URL — Free Image Hosting & Link Generator
home.meta.description: Convert any image to a URL free. Drop a JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF or SVG and get a fast CDN image link. Guest uploads auto-expire; signed-in users can keep links forever.
home.hero.description: The fastest way to host your images for free. Upload without an account for temporary links, or sign in to keep links forever.

home.howItWorks.upload.title: Upload

home.howItWorks.convert.title: Convert

home.howItWorks.share.title: Share

home.testimonials.title: Hear From Our

home.useCases.students.title: Students

home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.a1: Yes. Guests can upload 5 temporary images per rolling 24 hours. Sign in for free to get 50 permanent (keep-forever) uploads per day plus unlimited temporary uploads, dashboard history, and the option to keep any link forever. No credit card needed.
home.faq.a2: Guest uploads auto-expire at the monthly cleanup, with at least about two weeks before removal. Signed-in users can choose "Never delete" before uploading for a permanent link.
home.faq.a3: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, and SVG — up to 50 MB per file.
home.faq.a4: Not as a public API yet. The current upload endpoint is for the website uploader only. API-key based uploads are planned, but should not be treated as live production access today.
home.faq.a5: All images are served over HTTPS with SSL encryption. Data is stored on Cloudflare's encrypted infrastructure.
home.faq.q6: Does this work for a pic or a picture, not just an image?
home.faq.a6: Yes, image, photo, pic, or picture all work the same way. Upload one and a URL comes back. It also acts as a picture link creator and a pic link creator, and you get an online picture URL with no signup.
home.faq.q7: How do I copy the image URL after uploading?
home.faq.a7: Press the copy button next to the link and it lands on your clipboard. If you lose it later, open the image, right-click, and choose 'Copy image address' to get the exact same URL back.
home.faq.q8: How long do the links stay live?
home.faq.a8: Anonymous uploads stay up for at least two weeks, then clear at the start of the month. Sign in and choose 'Never delete' to keep a link working for good.
home.faq.q9: Can other people see what I upload?
home.faq.a9: Only someone with the link can open it. Your uploads aren't shown in any public gallery, and since no account is required, they aren't tied to your name.
home.faq.q10: Does it work on an iPhone or Android phone?
home.faq.a10: Yes. Open the site in any phone browser, tap the upload box, and pick a photo from your camera roll. The link comes back the same way it does on a desktop, with no app to install.
home.howTo.title: How to turn an image into a URL
home.howTo.subtitle: No app to install and no account to make. The steps are the same on a phone or a laptop.
home.howTo.p1: Drop your image in the box above. The second it finishes uploading you get a direct link. Paste that link into a forum reply, an email, a support ticket, or your code, and the picture shows up where you put it.
home.howTo.p2: On an iPhone or Android phone, tap the box, pick a photo from your camera roll, and copy the link it hands back. HEIC shots from an iPhone work fine — they get converted on the way in. On a computer you can drag a file straight off your desktop, or paste one you already copied with Ctrl+V (Cmd+V on a Mac).
home.howTo.p3: Uploaded something earlier and lost the link? Open the image, right-click it, and choose 'Copy image address'. That hands you the same URL again, ready to paste.
home.tools.title: Not sure which tool you need?
home.tools.subtitle: Most files just go in the box above. For these, a tool built for the job does it cleaner.
home.tools.discord: A link for Discord or a forum
home.tools.github: An image in a GitHub README

features.meta.title: Image Hosting Features — CDN, API, Security | ImageToURL
features.meta.description: Explore ImageToURL features: global CDN delivery, HTTPS encryption, guest uploads without signup, Markdown export, copy formats, and signed-in dashboard history.
features.hero.description: Everything you need to transform visual assets into production-ready URLs with global delivery, iron-clad security, and developer-first tooling.
features.speed.title: Speed and Performance
features.speed.cdn.title: CDN Delivery
features.speed.cdn.description: Our global Edge network ensures your images load instantly for users in Tokyo, London, or New York. No latency, just lightning-fast pixels.
features.speed.uptime.title: 99.9% Uptime
features.speed.uptime.description: Industrial grade infrastructure designed for scale. Your links stay live even under heavy viral traffic spikes.
features.security.title: Privacy & Security
features.security.https.title: HTTPS Secure
features.security.https.description: Every generated URL is encrypted via SSL, ensuring data integrity and user safety from end-to-end.
features.security.noSignup.title: No Signup Required

pricing.meta.title: Free Image Hosting Limits | ImageToURL
pricing.meta.description: ImageToURL is free: guests get 5 temporary uploads per rolling 24 hours, signed-in users get 50 permanent uploads per day plus unlimited temporary uploads and can keep links forever.
pricing.hero.description: Start free, sign in when you need saved links, and contact us if your workflow needs a higher upload limit.
pricing.free.label: Starter
pricing.free.name: Free
pricing.free.description: Fast temporary links without creating an account.
pricing.pro.label: Saved Links
pricing.pro.name: Free Account
pricing.pro.description: For links you need to find again or keep forever.
pricing.business.label: Need More
pricing.business.name: Higher Limits
pricing.business.description: For heavier workflows that outgrow the daily cap.
pricing.faq.title: Common Questions
pricing.faq.a1: Not as a self-serve subscription today. ImageToURL is free to use within the current upload limits. If you need more, contact us and we can review the limit manually. If you hit your daily limit, uploads simply pause until it refills — nothing breaks and nothing is charged.
pricing.faq.a2: Uploaded images are unlisted, not private. Anyone with the direct URL can open the image, so do not upload sensitive files.
pricing.faq.a3: Uploads support JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, and MP3 up to 50 MB. HEIC and PDF workflows are handled by browser tools before upload.
pricing.cta.title: Ready to transform your assets?

docs.meta.title: Developer Notes — Upload Status | ImageToURL
docs.meta.description: ImageToURL developer notes. Public API-key uploads are not live yet; the current upload endpoint is for same-site website uploads.
docs.hero.description: Developer notes for ImageToURL. Public API-key uploads are not live yet; use the website uploader for production links today.
docs.gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
docs.gettingStarted.description: The current upload route returns JSON for the ImageToURL web app, but it is guarded for same-site browser requests. Treat public REST/API-key upload docs as roadmap until the endpoint is opened.
docs.auth.title: Authentication
docs.auth.description: API-key authentication is not available for public uploads yet. Signed-in website uploads use your normal session cookie.
docs.upload.title: Upload an Image
docs.upload.description: Upload through the website to receive a CDN-cached URL. Guest uploads auto-expire; signed-in users can choose a permanent link before uploading.
docs.upload.name: Name
docs.upload.fileDesc: The image file (PNG, JPG, WebP) up to 50MB.
docs.upload.ttlDesc: Optional expiry choice: use "never" only when signed in; guests always auto-expire.
docs.upload.folderDesc: Optional analytics flag from the website uploader: 1 when ad-block detection is positive.
privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy — ImageToURL
privacy.meta.description: ImageToURL’s privacy policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our image hosting service.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is our top priority. We believe in transparency and protecting your data with the highest standards.
privacy.s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.s1.tech1: IP address for rate limiting and abuse prevention
privacy.s1.tech2: Browser type and version for compatibility
privacy.s1.analyticsDesc: We use Google Analytics to understand how our service is used. This data is anonymized and aggregated.
privacy.s2.title: 2. How We Protect Your Data
privacy.s2.httpsDesc: All data transfers use SSL/TLS encryption
privacy.s2.storageDesc: Images are stored on secure, encrypted cloud infrastructure
privacy.s2.noRegDesc: No registration or personal data needed to use our service
privacy.s3.title: 3. Data Retention
privacy.s3.imagesDesc: Guest uploads auto-expire at monthly cleanup. Signed-in uploads marked "Never delete" are stored indefinitely unless they violate our terms or are manually deleted.
privacy.s3.techLogsDesc: Access logs and analytics data are retained for 30 days for security and performance monitoring.
privacy.s3.errorLogsDesc: Technical error logs are retained for 7 days for debugging purposes.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
privacy.s4.r2Desc: Images are stored on Cloudflare R2, which provides secure object storage with built-in redundancy and DDoS protection.
privacy.s4.gaDesc: We use Google Analytics to understand usage patterns and improve our service. No personal information is shared.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Your Rights
privacy.s5.item1: Access information about the data we process about you
privacy.s5.item2: Request deletion of your uploaded images
privacy.s5.item3: File a complaint with data protection authorities
privacy.s5.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at blog.boopul@gmail.com.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Policy Updates
privacy.s6.intro: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will:
privacy.s6.item1: Post the updated policy on this page
privacy.s6.outro: Continued use of our service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Contact Us
privacy.s7.label: Questions about your privacy?
terms.meta.title: Terms of Service — ImageToURL
terms.meta.description: Terms of Service for ImageToURL image hosting. Understand upload limits, storage duration, and content rules.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using ImageToURL. By using our service, you agree to these conditions.
terms.summary.title: Quick Summary
terms.summary.item3: Guest links expire; signed-in users can choose permanent links
terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.description: By accessing and using ImageToURL (the “Service”), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.s2.title: 2. Use License
terms.s2.permitted1: Upload images that you own or have the right to share
terms.s2.permitted2: Use the generated URLs for personal and commercial purposes
terms.s2.permitted3: Embed images in websites, blogs, and applications
terms.s2.not2: Submit illegal, harmful, or offensive content
terms.s2.not4: Use the service for spam or malicious activities
terms.s3.title: 3. Prohibited Content
terms.s3.intro: The following types of content are strictly prohibited on ImageToURL:
terms.s3.item1: Any content that violates local, national, or international laws
terms.s3.item3: Graphic violence, gore, or hate speech
terms.s3.item4: Material you don’t own or have permission to share
terms.s3.item6: Private information about others without consent
terms.s4.title: 4. Account Terms
terms.s4.description: Anonymous uploads are permitted without an account. Signed-in features, including dashboard history and the "Never delete" option, require Google OAuth. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activities that occur under it.
terms.s5.title: 5. Limits and Payments
terms.s5.freeDesc: Guests can upload 5 temporary files per rolling 24 hours, no payment required.
terms.s5.proDesc: Signed-in users get 50 permanent uploads per day plus unlimited temporary uploads, and can choose the "Never delete" option before uploading.
terms.s5.businessDesc: Higher limits are reviewed manually by request. There is no self-serve paid subscription tier today.
terms.s5.cancel: If paid features are introduced later, their cancellation and refund terms will be shown before purchase.
terms.s6.title: 6. Service Limitations
terms.s6.fileSizeDesc: Maximum file size is 50MB per upload. Files exceeding this limit will be rejected.
terms.s6.rateDesc: We implement rate limiting to prevent abuse. Excessive uploads may be temporarily restricted.
terms.s6.storageDesc: Guest uploads auto-expire at monthly cleanup. Signed-in uploads marked "Never delete" are stored indefinitely unless removed by the user or for policy, abuse, or legal reasons.
terms.s6.availDesc: While we strive for 100% uptime, we cannot guarantee uninterrupted service availability.
terms.s7.title: 7. Content Removal
terms.s7.intro: We reserve the right to remove any content that:
terms.s7.contactIntro: To report inappropriate content, contact us at:
terms.s8.title: 8. Disclaimer
terms.s8.intro: The information on this website is provided on an “as is” basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, this Company:
terms.s8.item1: Excludes all representations and warranties relating to this website and its contents
terms.s8.item2: Makes no warranty that the website will meet your requirements
terms.s8.item3: Makes no warranty that the service will be uninterrupted, timely, or error-free
terms.s8.outro: Your use of this service is entirely at your own risk.
terms.s9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.s9.p1: In no event shall ImageToURL, nor any of its officers, directors, and employees, be liable to you for anything arising out of or in any way connected with your use of this website.
terms.s9.p2: ImageToURL shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, special, or consequential damages arising out of or related to your use of the service.
terms.s10.title: 10. Indemnification
terms.s10.description: You hereby indemnify to the fullest extent ImageToURL from and against any and all liabilities, costs, demands, causes of action, damages, and expenses (including reasonable attorney’s fees) arising out of or related to your breach of any of the provisions of these Terms.
terms.s11.title: 11. Severability
terms.s11.description: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid under any applicable law, such provisions shall be deleted without affecting the remaining provisions herein.
terms.s12.title: 12. Variation of Terms
terms.s12.description: ImageToURL is permitted to revise these Terms at any time as it sees fit, and by using this website you are expected to review these Terms on a regular basis.
terms.s13.title: 13. Assignment
terms.s13.description: ImageToURL is allowed to assign, transfer, and subcontract its rights and/or obligations under these Terms without any notification. However, you are not allowed to assign, transfer, or subcontract any of your rights and/or obligations under these Terms.
terms.s14.title: 14. Contact
terms.s14.label: Questions about our terms?
